title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kirloskar Electric - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kirloskar Electric - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!
